𝗩𝗜𝗕𝗥𝗔-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘 | Enabling users to easily create and preview mobile applications using AI, with the flexibility of an open-source and self-hostable solution.  🔍 Worth a Look

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to easily create and preview mobile applications using AI, with the flexibility of an open-source and self-hostable solution.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source AI app builder
✅ Describe app in plain English, AI builds it
✅ Native preview on phone
✅ Self-hostable
✅ Customizable AI prompts
✅ Swap AI providers
✅ Fork and modify


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Vibra Code is an open-source AI-powered mobile app builder that allows users to describe their desired app in plain English, which is then generated by AI. The generated apps can be previewed natively on a user's phone, and the entire system is self-hostable and customizable.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/sa4hnd/vibra-code

𝗣𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗧𝗣𝗔𝗪 | To provide users with a private, self-hosted personal AI assistant that can be easily installed and integrated into their daily communication workflows.  🔍 Worth a Look

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a private, self-hosted personal AI assistant that can be easily installed and integrated into their daily communication workflows.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✅ Self-hosted AI agent
✅ Desktop installer with UI
✅ Web dashboard
✅ Multi-platform communication (Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Browser)
✅ No subscription or cloud lock-in
✅ Data stays on user's machine
✅ Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, or Ollama LLMs
✅ 7-layer security

PocketPaw is a self-hosted, open-source personal AI agent designed for quick deployment. It offers a desktop installer and a web dashboard, allowing users to interact with their AI through various platforms like Discord, Slack, and Telegram, ensuring data privacy and avoiding cloud lock-in.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗖𝗥𝗢𝗦𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗘-𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗞𝗧𝗢𝗣 | To synchronize clipboard content across different devices and operating systems, allowing users to copy on one device and paste on another effortlessly.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices and operating systems, allowing users to copy on one device and paste on another effortlessly.
📅 Created: Nov 2023 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time Sharing
✅ Unified Cross-platform (Mac, Windows, Linux)
✅ Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File)
✅ End-to-End Encryption
✅ LAN-only Serverless Architecture
✅ Smart Space Management
✅ Built-in OCR
✅ MCP Server for AI Assistants
✅ Chrome Extension for Browser Sync


•••••••••••••••••••••••

CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types, offers end-to-end encryption, and operates in a serverless, LAN-only mode for enhanced privacy.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Building, optimizing, and debugging AI agent systems that require advanced context management and effective information curation within limited context windows.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: May 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Context Fundamentals
✅ Context Degradation Patterns
✅ Context Compression Strategies
✅ Multi-Agent Architecture Patterns (Orchestrator, Peer-to-Peer, Hierarchical)
✅ Memory Systems (Short-term, Long-term, Graph-based)
✅ Tool Design for Agents
✅ Filesystem Integration for Context Management
✅ Hosted Agents with Sandboxed VMs
✅ Context Optimization Techniques (Compaction, Masking, Caching)
✅ Latent Briefing for Worker Communication
✅ Evaluation Frameworks for Agent Systems
✅ Advanced LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation Techniques

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, focusing on optimizing how information is managed within an AI model's context window. It aims to enhance the effectiveness of production-grade AI agent systems by teaching principles of curating system prompts, tool definitions, message history, and tool outputs.

𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘𝗨𝗜 | To provide a unified, accessible, and feature-rich graphical user interface for managing and interacting with multiple AI code assistants across different devices.  🌟 Rising Fast!

📅 Created: Jun 2025 • Updated: May 2026

✅ Responsive Design (Desktop, Tablet, Mobile)
✅ Interactive Chat Interface
✅ Integrated Shell Terminal
✅ File Explorer with Syntax Highlighting and Live Editing
✅ Git Explorer (View, Stage, Commit, Branch)
✅ Session Management
✅ Plugin System
✅ TaskMaster AI Integration (Optional)
✅ Model Compatibility (Claude, GPT, Gemini)

CloudCLI (Claude Code UI) provides a user-friendly web and mobile interface for interacting with various AI code assistants like Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Codex, and Gemini. It allows users to manage projects, sessions, and code directly through a graphical interface, accessible locally or remotely.

𝗚𝗜𝗧𝗡𝗘𝗫𝗨𝗦 | To provide AI agents with a deep, architectural understanding of codebases for more reliable and intelligent code analysis and development.  🌟 Rising Fast!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide AI agents with a deep, architectural understanding of codebases for more reliable and intelligent code analysis and development.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Client-side knowledge graph creation
✅ Interactive graph explorer
✅ Graph RAG Agent for AI
✅ Codebase indexing (dependencies, call chains, clusters, execution flows)
✅ Web UI for chat and exploration
✅ CLI + MCP for AI agent integration
✅ Local processing and privacy (zero-server)


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 37.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 4.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 220 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GitNexus is a client-side code intelligence engine that creates an interactive knowledge graph of any codebase directly in the browser or via a CLI. It enables AI agents to deeply understand code architecture, dependencies, and execution flows, enhancing their reliability and performance.

•••••••••••••••••••••••
